name: bbb-english-lp
description: Codejump応用編 英会話スクールBBBのLP（独自SCSSガイドライン案件）

scripts.css: npm run sass:expand && npm run sass:min
scripts.js: mkdir -p dist/assets/js/app && cp src/js/fv.js dist/assets/js/fv.js && cat src/js/inview.js src/js/script.js > dist/assets/js/other.js && cp node_modules/gsap/dist/gsap.min.js node_modules/gsap/dist/ScrollTrigger.min.js dist/assets/js/app/
scripts.webp: find src/img -type f \( -iname '*.jpg' -o -iname '*.jpeg' -o -iname '*.png' \) | while read f; do out="dist/assets/images/${f#src/img/}"; out="${out%.*}.webp"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$out")"; cwebp -quiet -q 82 "$f" -o "$out"; done
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run css && npm run html && npm run js && npm run img && npm run webp && npm run copy
scripts.watch:img: chokidar 'src/img/**/*' -c 'npm run img && npm run webp'
